zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Deincourt於大約1344年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt45歲，母親Millicent la Zouche50歲。她於1348年6月5日之前與Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年4月2日在英國享年37歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Deincourt于大约1344年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt45岁，母亲Millicent la Zouche50岁。她于1348年6月5日之前与Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1380年4月2日在英国享年37岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Deincourt was born about 1344, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, was 45 and her mother, Millicent la Zouche, was 50. She married Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft before 5 June 1348, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died on 2 April 1380, in England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Deincourt est née environ 1344, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Millicent la Zouche, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft avant 5 juin 1348, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1380, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Deincourt um 1344 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt 45 und ihre Mutter Millicent la Zouche 50. Sie hat vor 5. Juni 1348 in London, England Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. April 1380 im Alter von 37 Jahren in England und wurde in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Deincourt è nata il circa 1344 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Millicent la Zouche, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft prima del 5 giugno 1348, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 2 aprile 1380, nel England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Deincourtが約1344年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourtは45歳，母Millicent la Zoucheは50歳であった。1348年6月5日以前にイギリスロンドンでSir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1380年4月2日にイギリスで37歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタリングボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Deincourt(이)가 대략 1344년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent la Zouche(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1348년 6월 5일 이전 영국 런던에서 Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 4월 2일 영국에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스탤링버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Deincourt nasceu aproximadamente 1344, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Millicent la Zouche, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft antes 5 de junho de 1348, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1380, em Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Deincourt родилась около 1344 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent la Zouche, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft перед 5 июнь 1348 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла 2 апреля 1380 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности сталлингбороую, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Deincourt nació aproximadamente 1344, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Millicent la Zouche, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft antes de 5 de junio de 1348, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió el 2 de abril de 1380, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
